package rulecoverage

func PositiveClearMapGo121() string {
    ruleID := "clear_map_go121"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`for k := range m { delete(m, k) }` in Go 1.21+ codebases"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
